---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Use Case
Describe the problem or need this feature addresses.
- Who will benefit from this feature?
- What workflow does it improve?

## Proposed Solution
Describe how you envision this feature working.

## Alternatives Considered
Have you considered alternative approaches? What are their pros/cons?

## Implementation Complexity
If you have technical knowledge, estimate:
- [ ] Simple (1-2 days)
- [ ] Medium (3-7 days)
- [ ] Complex (1-2 weeks)
- [ ] Very Complex (2+ weeks)
- [ ] Unknown

## Additional Context
Add any other context, screenshots, or examples.

## Related Issues
Link any related issues or PRs.
